incidents.Title: Windows Failed Logon Burst Detected
incidents.MITRETactic: TA0006 - Credential Access / T1110 Brute Force
incidents.Evidence: 5 Windows failed logons for labuser within 5 minutes
incidents.RecommendedAction: Review local security events, lock the account, and investigate the host
PlaybookActions: Incident tagged as Under Investigation
IP address queued for firewall block: labuser
Security team notified via Teams/Email alert
Incident ticket created in ITSM system

incidents.Title: Port Scan / Network Reconnaissance Detected
